Lt. Surge.name: Lt. Surge
Lt. Surge.rulesOrEffectText: Move all Lightning Energy from your Benched Voltorb, Electrode, Pikachu, Pikachu ex, Magnemite, or Magneton to your Active Pikachu or Pikachu ex.

Lisia.name: Lisia
Lisia.rulesOrEffectText: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Lightning-type Pokémon with 50 HP or less, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Poké Ball.name: Poké Ball
Poké Ball.rulesOrEffectText: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Misty.name: Misty
Misty.rulesOrEffectText: Choose 1 of your Benched or Active Water Pokémon. Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, attach 1 Water Energy from your Energy Zone to that Pokémon.

Sabrina.name: Sabrina
Sabrina.rulesOrEffectText: Your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

Giovanni.name: Giovanni
Giovanni.rulesOrEffectText: During this turn, your Pokémon's attacks deal +10 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Red Card.name: Red Card
Red Card.rulesOrEffectText: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 3 cards.

X Speed.name: X Speed
X Speed.rulesOrEffectText: During this turn, the Retreat Cost of your Active Pokémon is [C] less.

Rare Candy.name: Rare Candy
Rare Candy.rulesOrEffectText: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 Pokémon in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, evolve it directly into that Stage 2 Pokémon (skipping the Stage 1 evolution).

Potion.name: Potion
Potion.rulesOrEffectText: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

Erika.name: Erika
Erika.rulesOrEffectText: Heal 50 damage from 1 of your Grass Pokémon.

Blaine.name: Blaine
Blaine.rulesOrEffectText: During this turn, attacks from your Ninetales, Rapidash, or Magmar deal +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Koga.name: Koga
Koga.rulesOrEffectText: Put an Active Arbok or Weezing you have in play into your hand (all attached cards are returned to your hand).

Brock.name: Brock
Brock.rulesOrEffectText: Attach 1 Fighting Energy from your Energy Zone to 1 of your Benched Onix or Golem.

Fossil Excavator.name: Fossil Excavator
Fossil Excavator.rulesOrEffectText: Search your deck for up to 2 cards that have Fossil in their name (Helix Fossil, Dome Fossil, Old Amber), reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Helix Fossil.name: Helix Fossil
Helix Fossil.rulesOrEffectText: Play this card as if it were a Basic Pokémon (Colorless type). It has 40 HP and cannot attack or retreat.

Dome Fossil.name: Dome Fossil
Dome Fossil.rulesOrEffectText: Play this card as if it were a Basic Pokémon (Colorless type). It has 40 HP and cannot attack or retreat.

Old Amber.name: Old Amber
Old Amber.rulesOrEffectText: Play this card as if it were a Basic Pokémon (Colorless type). It has 40 HP and cannot attack or retreat.

Kanto Friends.name: Kanto Friends
Kanto Friends.rulesOrEffectText: Search your deck for a Bulbasaur, Charmander, or Squirtle, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Ivysaur.name: Ivysaur
Ivysaur.rulesOrEffectText:
NO. 002 Seed Pokémon HT: 3'3" WT: 28.7 lbs.
When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

Venusaur ex ex.name: Venusaur ex
Venusaur ex ex.rulesOrEffectText: ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent gets 2 Prize cards.

Caterpie.name: Caterpie

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Grass Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

Caterpie.rulesOrEffectText: For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.

Kakuna.name: Kakuna
Kakuna.rulesOrEffectText: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.

Venomoth.name: Venomoth

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Venomoth.rulesOrEffectText: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

ability.name: Fragrance Trap
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, once during your turn, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot.

Weepinbell.name: Weepinbell
Weepinbell.rulesOrEffectText: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
